sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73107" key="o)ligoxordi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλῐγο-χορδία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n73107.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fewness of strings,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1135d</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1137a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
